title: Intent Document
description: Frontmatter schema for an intent document. This is the machine-readable header of a .md intent file.

unit.description: Unique identifier for this intent unit. Slash-delimited path reflecting domain and capability. Must be stable across versions.

version.description: Semantic version of this intent document. Increment minor on non-breaking additions, major on breaking changes to behavioral contracts.

status.description: Lifecycle stage of this intent document.

enumDescriptions.draft: Work in progress. Not yet ready for review. Code must not be generated from this document.
enumDescriptions.review: Complete and submitted for stakeholder or peer review. Code must not be generated from this document.
enumDescriptions.approved: Reviewed and signed off. Code generation is permitted.
enumDescriptions.deprecated: Superseded or removed. Generated code derived from this document should be considered legacy.

author.description: Identity of the primary author. Use a consistent format within a project (e.g. handle, email, or full name).

reviewers.description: Identities of reviewers who have approved this document. Empty until status reaches 'approved'.

exposes.description: Public interfaces this unit exposes. Used to build the interface contract graph. Should be precise enough for an agent to verify against the implementation.

depends_on.description: Other intent units this unit calls or relies on. Use the canonical unit identifier. An agent uses this to verify dependency boundaries and detect circular intent.

must_not_know.description: Units or domains this unit must have zero knowledge of. Explicit boundary violations. An agent flags any implementation that imports or calls these.

supersedes.description: The unit identifier and version this document replaces, if any. Format: 'unit@version'.

tags.description: Freeform labels for filtering, grouping, or discovery. Not used by agents for enforcement.
